jira.description: Jira ticket read/write via MCP. Tools: jira_get_ticket, jira_search, jira_transition, jira_add_comment, jira_add_label.

github.description: GitHub MCP server — repos, branches, PRs, checks. Tools: github_get_repo, github_list_branches, github_create_branch, github_push_files, github_open_pr, github_get_pr, github_request_review.
